subcodes.first_line: O thou Trustworthy One! Each year, discreetly send one hundred tumans through reliable means to the handmaiden of God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب امین مبلغ صد تومان هر سال خفیا بورقه مطمئنه امه الله المهیمن القیوم برسانید
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @business; financial; property matters
